title: Craftable Smithing Templates (Armor Trims)
description: Adds unique recipes for the various smithing templates so that they can be crafted.
body:
Adds unique recipes for the various smithing templates so that they can be crafted. I made the recipes balanced and inline with the rest of the game.

With Version 1.2, when you pickup a diamond, the recipes are added to your recipe book, or you can use a mod like JEI to view the recipes.

Server side is supported. You can install this on the server and not need to have it installed on the clientside.
